This page 3.5 Flash

Gemini 3.6 Flash (gemini-3.6-flash) and Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite (gemini-3.5-flash-lite) are generally available (GA) and ready for production use.

  • Gemini 3.6 Flash: Stronger performance on complex agentic and multimodal tasks while reducing token usage, at a lower price point than 3.5 Flash.
  • Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite: The fastest, lowest-cost model in the 3.5 family. Outperforms prior Flash-Lite generations for high-throughput execution.

This guide explains what's new in each model, what API changes affect your code, and how to migrate.

Gemini 3.6 Flash

  1. Install the skill:

    npx skills add google-gemini/gemini-skills --skill gemini-interactions-api --global

  2. Apply the skill:

    /gemini-interactions-api migrate my app to Gemini 3.6 Flash

Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite

  1. Install the skill:

    npx skills add google-gemini/gemini-skills --skill gemini-interactions-api --global

  2. Apply the skill:

    /gemini-interactions-api migrate my app to Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite

New models

Model Model ID Default thinking level Pricing Description
Gemini 3.6 Flash gemini-3.6-flash medium $1.50/1M input tokens and $7.50/1M output tokens Balances speed with intelligence for agentic and multimodal tasks.
Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite gemini-3.5-flash-lite minimal $0.30/1M input tokens and $2.50/1M output tokens The fastest, lowest-cost 3.5 model for high-throughput execution.

Both models support the 1M token context window, 64k max output tokens, thinking, and the full suite of built-in tools including Computer Use.

For complete specs, see the model pages:

  • Gemini 3.6 Flash model page
  • Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite model page

For detailed pricing, see the pricing page.

Quickstart

Python

from google import genai

client = genai.Client()

interaction = client.interactions.create(
    model="gemini-3.6-flash",
    input="Write a three.js script that renders an interactive 3D robot."
)

print(interaction.output_text)

JavaScript

import { GoogleGenAI } from "@google/genai";

const ai = new GoogleGenAI({});

async function main() {
  const interaction = await ai.interactions.create({
    model: "gemini-3.6-flash",
    input: "Write a three.js script that renders an interactive 3D robot.",
  });
  console.log(interaction.outputText);
}

main();

REST

curl "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/interactions" \
  -H "x-goog-api-key: $GEMINI_API_KEY" \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -X POST \
  -d '{
    "model": "gemini-3.6-flash",
    "input": {
      "parts": [{"text": "Write a three.js script that renders an interactive 3D robot."}]
    }
  }'

What's new in Gemini 3.6 Flash

  • Token and turn reduction: Completes multi-step workflows with fewer reasoning steps, conversational turns, and tool calls than Gemini 3.5. It also reduces execution loop spiraling.
  • Improved code generation: Produces higher quality production-ready code with fewer unwanted edits and fewer debugging loops.
  • Better instruction following: Reduces unwanted file changes during diagnostic tasks.
  • Strong multimodal and spatial reasoning: Improved performance on chart interpretation, visual blueprint conversion, and multi-element web layout generation.
  • Upfront programmatic inspection: Prefers running diagnostic code scripts before making changes more frequently than Gemini 3.5 Flash. This improves accuracy on complex tasks, but can add extra exploratory steps on simple frontend work.
  • Computer Use support: Supported as native tool for agentic UI automation.
  • UI styling preference: Better at creating functional code, though human evaluators preferred earlier models for visual layout and styling. You can mitigate this by providing explicit design guidelines.
  • Default thinking effort (medium): Uses the same medium default thinking level as Gemini 3.5 Flash.
  • Reduced pricing: Lower output token costs ($7.50/1M vs. $9.00/1M for 3.5 Flash). Input tokens remain at $1.50/1M.

What's new in Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite

  • Reduced task execution latency: Highest throughput in the 3.5 family for high-volume data parsing and document extraction.
  • Enhanced reasoning and multimodal performance: Strong migration path from Gemini 2.5 Flash, with higher scores on reasoning tasks like HLE (18.0% vs. 11.0%) and multimodal benchmarks like CharXIV (74.5% vs. 63.7%).
  • Subagent orchestration and tool reliability: Improves tool execution reliability for code execution, search, and MCP workflows. Increase the thinking level for autonomous planning and complex subagent tasks.
  • Improved document understanding: Improves accuracy on document parsing and structured data extraction. Experiment with both minimal and high thinking levels depending on document complexity.
  • Interactive web coding and tabular data processing: Performs strongly on frontend JavaScript and tabular data processing by planning via lightweight code execution.
  • Chatbot and persona persistence: Stronger multi-turn instruction following and persona consistency over Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite.
  • Computer Use support: Supported as native tool for agentic UI automation.

Choosing the right Flash or Flash-Lite model

Use this table to select the right model and migration path for your workloads.

Both models require removing deprecated sampling parameters (temperature, top_p, top_k) and prefilled model turns. See API changes for details.

Model Primary use cases Recommended migration target
Gemini 3.6 Flash
gemini-3.6-flash		 Code generation, spatial/multimodal reasoning, multi-step agentic workflows Gemini 3.5 Flash, Gemini 3 Flash (Preview), or Gemini 3.1 Pro
Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite
gemini-3.5-flash-lite		 Autonomous subagent execution, high-volume data analysis and document extraction, structured JSON parsing Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite or Gemini 2.5 Flash

Updated Antigravity agent

Due to its improved performance, Gemini 3.6 Flash is now the new default model powering the Antigravity agent in Gemini Managed Agents. This can be changed by setting a new field on the API.

Python

from google import genai

client = genai.Client()

interaction = client.interactions.create(
    agent="antigravity-preview-05-2026",
    input="Read Hacker News, summarize the top 10 stories, and save the results as a PDF.",
    environment="remote",
)

print(interaction.output_text)

JavaScript

import { GoogleGenAI } from "@google/genai";

const client = new GoogleGenAI({});

const interaction = await client.interactions.create({
    agent: "antigravity-preview-05-2026",
    input: "Read Hacker News, summarize the top 10 stories, and save the results as a PDF.",
    environment: "remote",
}, { timeout: 300000 });

console.log(interaction.output_text);

REST

curl -X POST "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/interactions" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-H "x-goog-api-key: $GEMINI_API_KEY" \
-d '{
    "agent": "antigravity-preview-05-2026",
    "input": "Read Hacker News, summarize the top 10 stories, and save the results as a PDF.",
    "environment": "remote"
}'

API changes and parameter updates

Starting with Gemini 3.6 Flash and Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite, the following API changes apply to these models and all future Gemini model releases.

  • Sampling parameter deprecation: temperature, top_p, and top_k are deprecated. The API ignores these parameters and returns an error in future model generations.
  • Prefilled model turn validation: Prefilling model turns is no longer supported. If the last non-empty turn in the request is a model turn, the API returns a 400 error.

Below are detailed explanations and code samples for each API change.

1. Sampling parameter deprecation (temperature, top_p, top_k)

temperature, top_p, and top_k are deprecated and ignored. In future model generations, supplying these parameters returns an HTTP 400 error. Remove these parameters from all requests.

# ⚠️ Remove these parameters (deprecated)
generation_config = {
     "temperature": 0.7,
     "top_p": 0.9,
     "top_k": 40,
}

To improve determinism, define a system instruction with explicit rules for your specific use case.

2. Prefilled model turn validation

API requests ending with a non-empty model role turn are disallowed and return an HTTP 400 Error.

⚠️ Avoid

In legacy generateContent or raw REST payloads, ending with a model role turn is now disallowed:

/* ❌ DO NOT: End payload contents with a 'model' role turn */
{
  "contents": [
    {"role": "user", "parts": [{"text": "Translate 'Hello world' to Spanish."}]},
    {"role": "model", "parts": [{"text": "Translation:"}]}  /* ❌ Returns error */
  ]
}

✅ Recommended Migration (Interactions API)

In the Interactions API, model turns are not manually prefilled. If your application previously prefilled a model turn to suppress preambles or force JSON formatting, use system_instruction or Structured outputs instead.

# ✅ RECOMMENDED: Use system_instruction in the Interactions API to specify output format
interaction = client.interactions.create(
    model="gemini-3.6-flash",
    input="Translate 'Hello world' to Spanish.",
    system_instruction="Output only the translation without introductory text.",
)

Migration checklist

Gemini 3.6 Flash

  1. Install the skill:

    npx skills add google-gemini/gemini-skills --skill gemini-interactions-api --global

  2. Apply the skill:

    /gemini-interactions-api migrate my app to Gemini 3.6 Flash

Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite

  1. Install the skill:

    npx skills add google-gemini/gemini-skills --skill gemini-interactions-api --global

  2. Apply the skill:

    /gemini-interactions-api migrate my app to Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite

Migrate to gemini-3.6-flash

  • Update Model ID: Change your target model string to gemini-3.6-flash.
  • Remove deprecated sampling parameters:
    • Strip temperature, top_p, and top_k from generation configs.
    • Replace thinking_budget with the string enum thinking_level set to "medium" or "high".
    • Remove candidate_count (unsupported in Gemini 3.x).
  • Enforce turn validation rules:
    • Standardize multi-turn conversations on server-side previous_interaction_id.
    • Remove prefilled model turns.
  • Audit function calling:
    • Place multimodal assets inside the response payload.
    • Format inline instructions using \n\n.
    • If you see Malformed_Function_Call errors tied to pre-tool text, see Workarounds for pre-tool text requirements.
    • Only if using generateContent API: Ensure all FunctionResponse objects include call_id and name.
  • Baseline Gemini 3.x requirements: For SDK updates and thought signature preservation, see the Gemini 3.5 Migration Checklist.

Migrate to gemini-3.5-flash-lite

  • Update Model ID: Change your target model string to gemini-3.5-flash-lite.
  • Configure thinking effort level:
    • For high-volume extraction, routing, or classification: leave thinking_level at "minimal" (default) for maximum throughput.
    • For autonomous subagents with tool calls, code execution, or multi-step reasoning: set thinking_level to "medium" or "high" to prevent premature tool termination.
  • Remove deprecated parameters and validate function calling: Apply the same rules as 3.6 Flash.
  • Baseline Gemini 3.x requirements: Refer to the Gemini 3.5 Migration Checklist.

Next steps

  • Review API specs on the Models Overview.
  • Explore multi-agent orchestration in the Interactions API Guide.
  • Test and refine prompts in Google AI Studio.

blocks.html_en: What's new in Gemini 3.6 Flash
• Token and turn reduction: Completes multi-step workflows with fewer reasoning steps, conversational turns, and tool calls than Gemini 3.5. It also reduces execution loop spiraling.

sentences.en: Token and turn reduction: Completes multi-step workflows with fewer reasoning steps, conversational turns, and tool calls than Gemini 3.5.
sentences.zh: 令牌和回合减少：与 Gemini 3.5 相比，以更少的推理步骤、对话回合和工具调用完成多步骤工作流程。

sentences.en: It also reduces execution loop spiraling.
sentences.zh: 它还减少了执行循环的螺旋式上升。

blocks.html_en: • Improved code generation: Produces higher quality production-ready code with fewer unwanted edits and fewer debugging loops.

sentences.en: Improved code generation: Produces higher quality production-ready code with fewer unwanted edits and fewer debugging loops.
sentences.zh: 改进的代码生成：生成更高质量的生产就绪代码，减少不需要的编辑和调试循环。

blocks.html_en: • Better instruction following: Reduces unwanted file changes during diagnostic tasks.

sentences.en: Better instruction following: Reduces unwanted file changes during diagnostic tasks.
sentences.zh: 更好的说明如下：减少诊断任务期间不需要的文件更改。

blocks.html_en: • Strong multimodal and spatial reasoning: Improved performance on chart interpretation, visual blueprint conversion, and multi-element web layout generation.

sentences.en: Strong multimodal and spatial reasoning: Improved performance on chart interpretation, visual blueprint conversion, and multi-element web layout generation.
sentences.zh: 强大的多模式和空间推理：改进了图表解释、视觉蓝图转换和多元素网页布局生成的性能。

blocks.html_en: • Upfront programmatic inspection: Prefers running diagnostic code scripts before making changes more frequently than Gemini 3.5 Flash. This improves accuracy on complex tasks, but can add extra exploratory steps on simple frontend work.

sentences.en: Upfront programmatic inspection: Prefers running diagnostic code scripts before making changes more frequently than Gemini 3.5 Flash.
sentences.zh: 前期编程检查：与 Gemini 3.5 Flash 相比，更喜欢在进行更改之前更频繁地运行诊断代码脚本。

sentences.en: This improves accuracy on complex tasks, but can add extra exploratory steps on simple frontend work.
sentences.zh: 这提高了复杂任务的准确性，但可以在简单的前端工作上添加额外的探索步骤。

blocks.html_en: • Computer Use support: Supported as native tool for agentic UI automation.

sentences.en: Computer Use support: Supported as native tool for agentic UI automation.
sentences.zh: 计算机使用支持：支持作为代理 UI 自动化的本机工具。

blocks.html_en: • UI styling preference: Better at creating functional code, though human evaluators preferred earlier models for visual layout and styling. You can mitigate this by providing explicit design guidelines.

sentences.en: UI styling preference: Better at creating functional code, though human evaluators preferred earlier models for visual layout and styling.
sentences.zh: UI 样式偏好：更擅长创建功能代码，尽管人类评估者更喜欢早期的视觉布局和样式模型。

sentences.en: You can mitigate this by providing explicit design guidelines.
sentences.zh: 您可以通过提供明确的设计指南来缓解这种情况。

blocks.html_en: • Default thinking effort (medium): Uses the same medium default thinking level as Gemini 3.5 Flash.

sentences.en: Default thinking effort (medium): Uses the same medium default thinking level as Gemini 3.5 Flash.
sentences.zh: 默认思维努力（中）：使用与 Gemini 3.5 Flash 相同的中默认思维水平。

blocks.html_en: • Reduced pricing: Lower output token costs ($7.50/1M vs. $9.00/1M for 3.5 Flash). Input tokens remain at $1.50/1M.

sentences.en: Reduced pricing: Lower output token costs ($7.50/1M vs. $9.00/1M for 3.5 Flash).
sentences.zh: 降低定价：降低输出代币成本（3.5 闪存为 7.50 美元/100 万美元，而 3.5 闪存为 9.00 美元/100 万美元）。
输入代币保持在 1.50 美元/100 万美元。

blocks.html_en: What's new in Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite
• Reduced task execution latency: Highest throughput in the 3.5 family for high-volume data parsing and document extraction.

sentences.en: Reduced task execution latency: Highest throughput in the 3.5 family for high-volume data parsing and document extraction.
sentences.zh: 减少任务执行延迟：3.5 系列中吞吐量最高，适用于大容量数据解析和文档提取。

blocks.html_en: • Enhanced reasoning and multimodal performance: Strong migration path from Gemini 2.5 Flash, with higher scores on reasoning tasks like HLE (18.0% vs. 11.0%) and multimodal benchmarks like CharXIV (74.5% vs. 63.7%).

sentences.en: Enhanced reasoning and multimodal performance: Strong migration path from Gemini 2.5 Flash, with higher scores on reasoning tasks like HLE (18.0% vs. 11.0%) and multimodal benchmarks like CharXIV (74.5% vs. 63.7%).
sentences.zh: 增强的推理和多模式性能：从 Gemini 2.5 Flash 开始的强大迁移路径，在 HLE 等推理任务（18.0% vs. 11.0%）和 CharXIV 等多模式基准测试（74.5% vs. 63.7%）上得分更高。

blocks.html_en: • Subagent orchestration and tool reliability: Improves tool execution reliability for code execution, search, and MCP workflows. Increase the thinking level for autonomous planning and complex subagent tasks.

sentences.en: Subagent orchestration and tool reliability: Improves tool execution reliability for code execution, search, and MCP workflows.
sentences.zh: 子代理编排和工具可靠性：提高代码执行、搜索和 MCP 工作流程的工具执行可靠性。

sentences.en: Increase the thinking level for autonomous planning and complex subagent tasks.
sentences.zh: 提高自主规划和复杂子代理任务的思维水平。

blocks.html_en: • Improved document understanding: Improves accuracy on document parsing and structured data extraction. Experiment with both minimal and high thinking levels depending on document complexity.

sentences.en: Improved document understanding: Improves accuracy on document parsing and structured data extraction.
sentences.zh: 改进文档理解：提高文档解析和结构化数据提取的准确性。

sentences.en: Experiment with both minimal and high thinking levels depending on document complexity.
sentences.zh: 根据文档的复杂性，尝试最低和最高的思维水平。

blocks.html_en: • Interactive web coding and tabular data processing: Performs strongly on frontend JavaScript and tabular data processing by planning via lightweight code execution.

sentences.en: Interactive web coding and tabular data processing: Performs strongly on frontend JavaScript and tabular data processing by planning via lightweight code execution.
sentences.zh: 交互式 Web 编码和表格数据处理：通过轻量级代码执行进行规划，在前端 JavaScript 和表格数据处理上表现出色。

blocks.html_en: • Chatbot and persona persistence: Stronger multi-turn instruction following and persona consistency over Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite.

sentences.en: Chatbot and persona persistence: Stronger multi-turn instruction following and persona consistency over Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite.
sentences.zh: 聊天机器人和角色持久性：比 Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 具有更强的多轮指令跟踪和角色一致性。

blocks.html_en: • Computer Use support: Supported as native tool for agentic UI automation.

sentences.en: Computer Use support: Supported as native tool for agentic UI automation.
sentences.zh: 计算机使用支持：支持作为代理 UI 自动化的本机工具。

blocks.html_en: Updated Antigravity agent
Due to its improved performance, Gemini 3.6 Flash is now the new default model powering the Antigravity agent in Gemini Managed Agents. This can be changed by setting a new field on the API.

sentences.en: Due to its improved performance, Gemini 3.6 Flash is now the new default model powering the Antigravity agent in Gemini Managed Agents.
sentences.zh: 由于其性能的改进，Gemini 3.6 Flash 现在成为为 Gemini Managed Agents 中的 Antigravity 代理提供支持的新默认模型。

sentences.en: This can be changed by setting a new field on the API.
sentences.zh: 这可以通过在 API 上设置新字段来更改。

blocks.html_en: API changes and parameter updates
Starting with Gemini 3.6 Flash and Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite, the following API changes apply to these models and all future Gemini model releases.

sentences.en: Starting with Gemini 3.6 Flash and Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite, the following API changes apply to these models and all future Gemini model releases.
sentences.zh: 从 Gemini 3.6 Flash 和 Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite 开始，以下 API 更改适用于这些型号以及所有未来的 Gemini 型号版本。

blocks.html_en: • Sampling parameter deprecation: temperature, top_p, and top_k are deprecated. The API ignores these parameters and returns an error in future model generations.

sentences.en: Sampling parameter deprecation: temperature, top_p, and top_k are deprecated.
sentences.zh: 采样参数弃用：温度、top_p 和 top_k 已弃用。

sentences.en: The API ignores these parameters and returns an error in future model generations.
sentences.zh: API 会忽略这些参数并在未来的模型生成中返回错误。

blocks.html_en: • Prefilled model turn validation: Prefilling model turns is no longer supported. If the last non-empty turn in the request is a model turn, the API returns a 400 error.

sentences.en: Prefilled model turn validation: Prefilling model turns is no longer supported.
sentences.zh: 预填充模型转弯验证：不再支持预填充模型转弯。

sentences.en: If the last non-empty turn in the request is a model turn, the API returns a 400 error.
sentences.zh: 如果请求中的最后一个非空回合是模型回合，则 API 将返回 400 错误。

blocks.html_en: Below are detailed explanations and code samples for each API change.

sentences.en: Below are detailed explanations and code samples for each API change.
sentences.zh: 以下是每个 API 更改的详细说明和代码示例。

blocks.html_en: 1. Sampling parameter deprecation (temperature, top_p, top_k)
temperature, top_p, and top_k are deprecated and ignored. In future model generations, supplying these parameters returns an HTTP 400 error. Remove these parameters from all requests.

sentences.en: temperature, top_p, and top_k are deprecated and ignored.
sentences.zh: temp、top_p 和 top_k 已弃用并被忽略。

sentences.en: In future model generations, supplying these parameters returns an HTTP 400 error.
sentences.zh: 在未来的模型中，提供这些参数会返回 HTTP 400 错误。

sentences.en: Remove these parameters from all requests.
sentences.zh: 从所有请求中删除这些参数。

blocks.html_en: To improve determinism, define a system instruction with explicit rules for your specific use case.

sentences.en: To improve determinism, define a system instruction with explicit rules for your specific use case.

blocks.html_en: 2. Prefilled model turn validation
API requests ending with a non-empty model role turn are disallowed and return an HTTP 400 Error.

sentences.en: API requests ending with a non-empty model role turn are disallowed and return an HTTP 400 Error.
sentences.zh: 不允许以非空模型角色回合结尾的 API 请求，并返回 HTTP 400 错误。

blocks.html_en: In legacy generateContent or raw REST payloads, ending with a model role turn is now disallowed:

sentences.en: In legacy generateContent or raw REST payloads, ending with a model role turn is now disallowed:
sentences.zh: 在旧版generateContent或原始REST有效负载中，现在不允许以模型角色转变结束：

blocks.html_en: ✅ Recommended Migration (Interactions API)

In the Interactions API, model turns are not manually prefilled. If your application previously prefilled a model turn to suppress preambles or force JSON formatting, use system_instruction or Structured outputs instead.

sentences.en: In the Interactions API, model turns are not manually prefilled.
sentences.zh: 在交互 API 中，模型轮次不是手动预填充的。

sentences.en: If your application previously prefilled a model turn to suppress preambles or force JSON formatting, use system_instruction or Structured outputs instead.

    • Remove candidate_count (unsupported in Gemini 3.x).

本页 3.5 闪存

Gemini 3.6 Flash (gemini-3.6-flash) 和 Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite (gemini-3.5-flash-lite) 已全面上市 (GA) 并可供生产使用。

  • Gemini 3.6 Flash：在复杂的代理和多模式任务上具有更强的性能，同时减少令牌使用，价格比 3.5 Flash 更低。
  • Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite：3.5 系列中速度最快、成本最低的型号。 在高吞吐量执行方面优于前几代 Flash-Lite。

本指南介绍了每个模型中的新增功能、哪些 API 更改会影响您的代码以及如何迁移。

双子座3.6闪存

  1. 安装技能： npx Skills add google-gemini/gemini-skills --skill gemini-interactions-api --global
  2. 应用技能：/gemini-interactions-api 将我的应用程序迁移到 Gemini 3.6 Flash

Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite

  1. 安装技能： npx Skills add google-gemini/gemini-skills --skill gemini-interactions-api --global
  2. 应用技能：/gemini-interactions-api 将我的应用程序迁移到 Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite

新型号

Model 型号编号 默认思维水平 定价 描述
双子座3.6闪存 Gemini-3.6-flash 中等的 $1.50/1M 输入代币和 $7.50/1M 输出代币 在代理和多模式任务中平衡速度与智能。
Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite Gemini-3.5-flash-lite 最小的 $0.30/1M 输入代币和 $2.50/1M 输出代币 用于高吞吐量执行的速度最快、成本最低的 3.5 模型。

两种模型都支持 1M 令牌上下文窗口、最大 64k 输出令牌、思维以及包括计算机使用在内的全套内置工具。

有关完整规格，请参阅型号页面：

  • Gemini 3.6 Flash 模型页面
  • Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite 型号页面

有关详细定价，请参阅定价页面。

快速入门

Python

from google import genai

client = genai.Client()

interaction = client.interactions.create(
    model="gemini-3.6-flash",
    input="Write a three.js script that renders an interactive 3D robot."
)

print(interaction.output_text)

JavaScript

import { GoogleGenAI } from "@google/genai";

const ai = new GoogleGenAI({});

async function main() {
  const interaction = await ai.interactions.create({
    model: "gemini-3.6-flash",
    input: "Write a three.js script that renders an interactive 3D robot.",
  });
  console.log(interaction.outputText);
}

main();

REST

curl "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/interactions" \
  -H "x-goog-api-key: $GEMINI_API_KEY" \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -X POST \
  -d '{
    "model": "gemini-3.6-flash",
    "input": {
      "parts": [{"text": "Write a three.js script that renders an interactive 3D robot."}]
    }
  }'

Gemini 3.6 Flash 的新增功能

  • 令牌和回合减少：与 Gemini 3.5 相比，以更少的推理步骤、对话回合和工具调用完成多步骤工作流程。 它还减少了执行循环的螺旋式上升。
  • 改进的代码生成：生成更高质量的生产就绪代码，减少不需要的编辑和调试循环。
  • 更好的说明如下：减少诊断任务期间不需要的文件更改。
  • 强大的多模式和空间推理：改进了图表解释、视觉蓝图转换和多元素网页布局生成的性能。
  • 前期编程检查：与 Gemini 3.5 Flash 相比，更喜欢在进行更改之前更频繁地运行诊断代码脚本。 这提高了复杂任务的准确性，但可以在简单的前端工作上添加额外的探索步骤。
  • 计算机使用支持：支持作为代理 UI 自动化的本机工具。
  • UI 样式偏好：更擅长创建功能代码，尽管人类评估者更喜欢早期的视觉布局和样式模型。 您可以通过提供明确的设计指南来缓解这种情况。
  • 默认思维努力（中）：使用与 Gemini 3.5 Flash 相同的中默认思维水平。
  • 降低定价：降低输出代币成本（3.5 闪存为 7.50 美元/100 万美元，而 3.5 闪存为 9.00 美元/100 万美元）。 输入代币保持在 1.50 美元/100 万美元。

Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite 的新增功能

  • 减少任务执行延迟：3.5 系列中吞吐量最高，适用于大容量数据解析和文档提取。
  • 增强的推理和多模式性能：从 Gemini 2.5 Flash 开始的强大迁移路径，在 HLE 等推理任务（18.0% vs. 11.0%）和 CharXIV 等多模式基准测试（74.5% vs. 63.7%）上得分更高。
  • 子代理编排和工具可靠性：提高代码执行、搜索和 MCP 工作流程的工具执行可靠性。 提高自主规划和复杂子代理任务的思维水平。
  • 改进文档理解：提高文档解析和结构化数据提取的准确性。 根据文档的复杂性，尝试最低和最高的思维水平。
  • 交互式 Web 编码和表格数据处理：通过轻量级代码执行进行规划，在前端 JavaScript 和表格数据处理上表现出色。
  • 聊天机器人和角色持久性：比 Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 具有更强的多轮指令跟踪和角色一致性。
  • 计算机使用支持：支持作为代理 UI 自动化的本机工具。

选择正确的 Flash 或 Flash-Lite 型号

使用此表为您的工作负载选择正确的模型和迁移路径。

这两种模型都需要删除已弃用的采样参数（温度、top_p、top_k）和预填充的模型匝数。 有关详细信息，请参阅 API 更改。

Model 主要用例 推荐迁移目标
双子座 3.6 Flashgemini-3.6-flash 代码生成、空间/多模式推理、多步骤代理工作流程 Gemini 3.5 Flash、Gemini 3 Flash（预览版）或 Gemini 3.1 Pro
Gemini 3.5 Flash-Litegemini-3.5-flash-lite 自主子代理执行、大容量数据分析和文档提取、结构化 JSON 解析 Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 或 Gemini 2.5 Flash

更新了反重力药剂

由于其性能的改进，Gemini 3.6 Flash 现在成为为 Gemini Managed Agents 中的 Antigravity 代理提供支持的新默认模型。 这可以通过在 API 上设置新字段来更改。

Python

from google import genai

client = genai.Client()

interaction = client.interactions.create(
    agent="antigravity-preview-05-2026",
    input="Read Hacker News, summarize the top 10 stories, and save the results as a PDF.",
    environment="remote",
)

print(interaction.output_text)

JavaScript

import { GoogleGenAI } from "@google/genai";

const client = new GoogleGenAI({});

const interaction = await client.interactions.create({
    agent: "antigravity-preview-05-2026",
    input: "Read Hacker News, summarize the top 10 stories, and save the results as a PDF.",
    environment: "remote",
}, { timeout: 300000 });

console.log(interaction.output_text);

REST

curl -X POST "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/interactions" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-H "x-goog-api-key: $GEMINI_API_KEY" \
-d '{
    "agent": "antigravity-preview-05-2026",
    "input": "Read Hacker News, summarize the top 10 stories, and save the results as a PDF.",
    "environment": "remote"
}'

API变更及参数更新

从 Gemini 3.6 Flash 和 Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite 开始，以下 API 更改适用于这些型号以及所有未来的 Gemini 型号版本。

  • 采样参数弃用：温度、top_p 和 top_k 已弃用。 API 会忽略这些参数并在未来的模型生成中返回错误。
  • 预填充模型转弯验证：不再支持预填充模型转弯。 如果请求中的最后一个非空回合是模型回合，则 API 将返回 400 错误。

以下是每个 API 更改的详细说明和代码示例。

1. 采样参数弃用（温度、top_p、top_k）

temp、top_p 和 top_k 已弃用并被忽略。 在未来的模型中，提供这些参数会返回 HTTP 400 错误。 从所有请求中删除这些参数。

# ⚠️ Remove these parameters (deprecated)
generation_config = {
     "temperature": 0.7,
     "top_p": 0.9,
     "top_k": 40,
}

To improve determinism, define a system instruction with explicit rules for your specific use case.

2. 预填充模型轮验证

不允许以非空模型角色回合结尾的 API 请求，并返回 HTTP 400 错误。

⚠️ Avoid

在旧版generateContent或原始REST有效负载中，现在不允许以模型角色转变结束：

/* ❌ DO NOT: End payload contents with a 'model' role turn */
{
  "contents": [
    {"role": "user", "parts": [{"text": "Translate 'Hello world' to Spanish."}]},
    {"role": "model", "parts": [{"text": "Translation:"}]}  /* ❌ Returns error */
  ]
}

✅ 推荐迁移（交互 API）

在交互 API 中，模型轮次不是手动预填充的。 If your application previously prefilled a model turn to suppress preambles or force JSON formatting, use system_instruction or Structured outputs instead.

# ✅ RECOMMENDED: Use system_instruction in the Interactions API to specify output format
interaction = client.interactions.create(
    model="gemini-3.6-flash",
    input="Translate 'Hello world' to Spanish.",
    system_instruction="Output only the translation without introductory text.",
)

迁移清单

双子座3.6闪存

  1. 安装技能： npx Skills add google-gemini/gemini-skills --skill gemini-interactions-api --global
  2. 应用技能：/gemini-interactions-api 将我的应用程序迁移到 Gemini 3.6 Flash

Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite

  1. 安装技能： npx Skills add google-gemini/gemini-skills --skill gemini-interactions-api --global
  2. 应用技能：/gemini-interactions-api 将我的应用程序迁移到 Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite

迁移到gemini-3.6-flash

  • 更新型号 ID：将目标型号字符串更改为 gemini-3.6-flash。
  • 删除已弃用的采样参数：从生成配置中去除温度、top_p 和 top_k。 将thinking_budget 替换为设置为“medium”或“high”的字符串枚举thinking_level。 删除candidate_count（Gemini 3.x 中不支持）。
  • 强制执行轮次验证规则：标准化服务器端 previous_interaction_id 上的多轮对话。 移除预填充的模型匝。
  • 审核函数调用：将多模式资产放置在响应负载中。 使用 \n\n 格式化内联指令。 如果您看到与工具前文本相关的 Malformed_Function_Call 错误，请参阅工具前文本要求的解决方法。 仅当使用generateContent API时：确保所有FunctionResponse对象包含call_id和name。
  • Gemini 3.x 基准要求：有关 SDK 更新和思想签名保留的信息，请参阅 Gemini 3.5 迁移清单。

迁移到gemini-3.5-flash-lite

  • 更新型号 ID：将目标型号字符串更改为 gemini-3.5-flash-lite。
  • 配置思考工作级别：对于大量提取、路由或分类：将thinking_level 保留为“最小”（默认）以获得最大吞吐量。 对于具有工具调用、代码执行或多步推理的自主子代理：将thinking_level设置为“中”或“高”以防止工具过早终止。
  • 删除已弃用的参数并验证函数调用：应用与 3.6 Flash 相同的规则。
  • Gemini 3.x 基准要求：请参阅 Gemini 3.5 迁移清单。

后续步骤

  • 查看模型概述中的 API 规范。
  • 在交互 API 指南中探索多代理编排。
  • 在 Google AI Studio 中测试和完善提示。
